metaDescription: TokoHPL's privacy policy covering site usage and WhatsApp communication.
heading: Privacy Policy
intro: TokoHPL (tokohpl.com), operated by CV. Varindo Forma Hutama, is committed to protecting the privacy of every visitor. TokoHPL is a product catalog with no account system, shopping cart, or checkout, so the site does not collect your personal data directly. This policy explains how information is handled, including when you contact us via WhatsApp.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.body: tokohpl.com has no forms, accounts, shopping cart, or checkout, so we do not collect personal data through the site. If you choose to contact us via the "Ask via WhatsApp" button, that conversation happens directly in your WhatsApp app — any information you share there is entirely outside this site's systems.

use.title: 2. How We Use Information
use.body: Information you share through a WhatsApp conversation is used solely to respond to your questions and assist with your order. We do not use it for third-party marketing purposes or sell it to other parties.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage
storage.body: This site does not store your personal data on our servers. The only thing saved on your device is your language preference (Indonesian/English), via a cookie that contains no personal information.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing Information with Third Parties
sharing.body: Since this site does not collect your personal data, we don't share it with any third party, except where required by applicable law in Indonesia.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.body: Conversations via WhatsApp are protected by WhatsApp's own end-to-end encryption. We do not keep copies of those conversations in our systems.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.body: Since we don't store your personal data in our systems, there's no site data to access, correct, or delete. If you have questions about a WhatsApp conversation with us, please reach out by email at <email>tokohpl.admin@gmail.com</email>.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.body: This site uses a single functional cookie to remember your language preference (Indonesian/English). It isn't used for tracking or advertising, and can be cleared at any time through your browser settings.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Significant changes will be reflected on this page with an updated effective date.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
